source_package.name: OpenBible.com downloadable application
source_package.default_rights: The package states that the majority of its content and code is provided under CC0 and may be copied, adapted, and shared commercially or noncommercially, with or without attribution.

exceptions.terms: The package requires attached copyright notices to be maintained and the associated Bible text not to be modified.
notices: The Berean Bible (www.Berean.Bible) Berean Study Bible (BSB) © 2016, 2020 by Bible Hub and Berean.Bible. Used by Permission. All rights Reserved. Free downloads and licensing available.
Text courtesy of BibleProtector.com. Section Headings Courtesy Berean Study Bible.
This text of God's Word has been dedicated to the public domain. Free resources and databases are available at BereanBible.com.

exceptions.terms: The package identifies the scripts as created with ZoomSearchEngine® by Passmark Software® and requires their copyright notices to be maintained.
exceptions.repository_status: Not bundled; replaced by generated JSON search indexes.

transformations: Bible text and study pages converted to structured JSON records.
Local search indexes generated from packaged text and study data.
Cross-reference graph and word-map analysis data generated from packaged records.
Hebrew and Greek interlinear records assembled from packaged text and Strong's mappings.
Supplemental workbook translations imported into the same per-book JSON format.
